200.description: Successful response with lend action details

schema.description: Vault ID to interact with. Use the Jupiter `https://lite-api.jup.ag/lend/v1/borrow/vaults` endpoint to list available vaults.
Position ID to interact with. If not provided, a new position will be created.

get.description: Get available deposit actions for a token

400.description: Bad request, e.g. no amount and percentage provided

422.description: Vault validation error or parameter validation error

schema.description: Vault ID to interact with. Use the Jupiter `https://lite-api.jup.ag/lend/v1/borrow/vaults` endpoint to list available vaults.
Position ID to interact with. If not provided, a new position will be created.
Amount to deposit or withdraw.
Percentage to deposit or withdraw (0-100). Takes priority over `amount`.

post.description: Execute a deposit transaction for the specified vault and amount

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

200.description: Successful response with swap action details

schema.description: Token pair in format input-output. Input and output are token symbols or addresses.

get.description: Get available swap actions for a token pair

200.description: Successful response with fixed amount swap action details

schema.description: Token pair in format input-output. Input and output are token symbols or addresses.
Amount of the input token to swap. If the input token is SOL, this is in SOL, otherwise, this is in USD equivalent of input.

get.description: Get swap action details for a specific token pair and amount

422.description: Token metadata not found or validation error

schema.description: Token pair in format input-output. Input and output are token symbols or addresses.
Amount of the input token to swap. If the input token is SOL, this is in SOL, otherwise, this is in USD equivalent of input.

post.description: Execute a swap transaction for the specified token pair and amount

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction
